title: Bypassing Windows Defender with PowerShell: A Red Team Deep Dive
excerpt: Learn how attackers use PowerShell to evade AMSI and Windows Defender. This guide covers obfuscation techniques, reflection loading, and real‑world tradecraft used in penetration testing engagements.

title: Hardware: The Final Frontier of Betrayal
excerpt: Exposing the hidden instruction sets in consumer-grade processors that facilitate silent system overrides.

title: Post-Quantum Cryptography or Extinction
excerpt: A technical mandate for the immediate migration to lattice-based encryption to survive the upcoming decryption singularity.
